data.body:
Trump says the relationship with NATO has been only one way?
Not true.
The collective defense provision-attack on one is an attack on all-has only been invoked once: in defense of the US, after 9/11. More than 1000 NATO troops were killed or injured fighting for the US.
#USDemocracy #Voices4Victory
